comment: Brand b-roll source manifest. Every clip is a Higgsfield generation job id (model veo3_1_lite, 16:9, 6s, silent). Re-fetch with this script or re-generate from the recorded prompt. Clips are raw sources for the site film layer; they are not wired into any page until placed deliberately.

speed_f1.description: Formula 1 car through a corner, low tracking camera, golden light

speed_jets.description: Two fighter jets low across a morning sky, vapour trails
speed_jets.grade: scale=960:-2, curves=all='0/0.55 0.5/0.78 1/0.97', eq=saturation=0.40:contrast=0.80:brightness=0.04, gblur=sigma=1.0, libx264 crf=31, silent
speed_jets.grade_rationale: Chosen for the verification section because the message there is speed and proof -- clone it, run it, watch the suite collect. Bright sky also means almost no detail to fight the terminal transcript beside it. Graded like the other plates: darkest 5% lifted to rgb(159,176,178) so a .90 overlay keeps --text-3 at 4.68:1 and the blue kicker at 4.66:1, both above the 4.5 floor. The transcript itself is unaffected -- .terminal is opaque #161616.

speed_expressway.description: Night expressway, cars as long light streaks, towers behind

office_pair.description: Two professional women collaborating at monitors, warm natural light

office_opsroom.description: Operations room, wall of screens, team discussing, one woman laughing
office_opsroom.grade: scale=960:-2, curves=all='0/0.55 0.5/0.78 1/0.97', eq=saturation=0.45:contrast=0.82:brightness=0.04, gblur=sigma=1.1, libx264 crf=31, silent
office_opsroom.grade_rationale: Graded to a background plate rather than used raw. The ungraded clip's darkest 5% averages rgb(8,16,38); behind body copy that pushed --text-3 and the blue kicker to ~3.2:1, under WCAG AA. Lifting the black point to rgb(149,153,156) lets the overlay sit at .90 while both measure 4.60:1 and 4.58:1 -- at or above their 4.57:1 and 4.55:1 baseline on solid --bg-alt.

towers_bluehour.description: Financial district glass towers at blue hour, slow upward tilt
